title: Web Scraping Terms of Service
concept: Respecting robots.txt, terms of service, and rate limit boundaries during autonomous navigation.

exercises.prompt: What should AI agents do to prevent making harmful actions online?

options.text: Follow the website's rules and permissions
Always perform actions at maximum speed

exercises.explain: AI agents need to respect the rules set by websites to avoid harmful actions.

cards.title: Web Scraping Terms of Service
cards.body: Understanding web scraping terms is important for safe and respectful online behavior.

cards.title: What is robots.txt?
cards.body: Robots.txt is a file that tells web crawlers which parts of a site they are allowed to visit.

cards.title: Road Signs for Robots
cards.body: Just like road signs guide drivers on where they can go, robots.txt files guide AI on what parts of a website are off-limits.

cards.title: Respecting Rules Online
cards.body: If a website's robots.txt says 'disallow: /private', an AI should avoid that section to follow the rules.

cards.title: Myth: AI Can Access Everything Online
cards.body: Not everything online is available to AI; respect for robots.txt and terms of service is crucial.

cards.title: Rate Limiting in Action
cards.body: Rate limits control how often AI can access a website to prevent overload.

exercises.prompt: What file helps guide AI on what parts of a website to access?
exercises.explain: The robots.txt file specifically instructs automated agents on which areas of the site they can visit.

exercises.prompt: Should AI agents follow the website's terms of service while scraping?
exercises.explain: AI agents must always abide by the terms of service to ensure ethical behavior.

exercises.prompt: Respecting robots.txt is an essential part of following the website's ______.
exercises.sentence: Respecting robots.txt is an essential part of following the website's terms of service.
exercises.explain: The correct term, 'terms of service,' highlights the legal agreements governing website usage.

exercises.prompt: Which option is most respectful to a website's rules?

options.text: Following the guidelines set in the terms of service

exercises.explain: Following the terms of service shows respect for the website and prevents potential misuse.

exercises.prompt: Why is it important for AI agents to respect robots.txt and rate limits?

options.text: It helps save server resources and respects website owners' rules.
It allows AI agents to perform faster actions without restrictions.
It makes the scraping process more complex and slow.
It ensures robots operate without any rules or regulations.

exercises.explain: Respecting robots.txt and rate limits minimizes strain on servers and maintains ethical practices online.
